data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong congratulates pro-crypto governors Abigail Spanberger & Mikie Sherrill, calling it a milestone moment for advocates.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc.'s CEO, Brian Armstrong, commended the inaugurations of Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia and Mikie Sherrill as Governor of New Jersey, seeing it as a victory for supporters of cryptocurrency. Armstrong congratulated the new governors in a social media post, marking this as a significant moment for pro-cryptocurrency advocates in positions of power. He mentioned it as another step forward for those supportive of crypto taking office, expressing his admiration for their stance. Spanberger, who had an intricate history with crypto policy, notably secured her victory in the previous year. The blockchain leader appreciated the increasing presence of pro-cryptocurrency figures in political offices nationwide, illustrating a positive trend for the industry.

data.title: TGR Haas F1 Team unveils VF-26 car for 2026 season, enters new phase of collaboration with Zoomex.
data.description: In the city of Victoria, the capital of Seychelles, the TGR Haas F1 Team introduced its latest race car, the VF-26, on January 19, 2026, marking the start of the 2026 season. This unveiling not only showcased the new vehicle but also highlighted the deepening collaboration between Zoomex and TGR Haas F1 Team. The partnership between the two entities has now entered a more advanced stage, signifying a step forward in their joint efforts within the racing domain.

data.title: New guidelines for elderly and disabled customers rolled out by HKMA and HKAB in Hong Kong to support silver economy.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Hong Kong Association of Banks (HKAB) have introduced new banking guidelines aimed at assisting elderly customers and individuals with disabilities. This initiative is part of Hong Kong's efforts to promote its silver economy, focusing on the needs of its aging population. The guidelines are designed to enhance the banking experience for these specific demographics and provide them with better access to financial services. This move signifies a step forward in addressing the unique requirements of elderly and disabled individuals in the banking sector.

data.title: Chainlink integrates data feeds for US equities to enable 24-hour trading of stocks and ETFs through blockchain.
data.description: Numerous crypto companies and traditional exchanges are quickly moving to provide 24/7 trading for stocks and ETFs using technology based on blockchain. This allows traders to access these assets at all times, representing a significant shift in the trading landscape. The move towards continuous trading is gaining traction, with a notable increase in interest and demand for such services. This move is making stocks and ETFs more accessible and offering more flexibility to investors. The growing trend towards blockchain technology in the financial sector is reshaping how traditional assets are traded.

data.title: AS Silvano Fashion Group proposes resolution without convening a meeting, registry code 10175491, Tallinn, Tulika 17.
data.description: The Management Board of AS Silvano Fashion Group, with registry code 10175491 and based at Tulika 17, 10613, Tallinn, suggests that shareholders approve a resolution without holding a meeting according to § 299 1 of the Commercial Code.

data.title: LEPAS opens world's first showroom in Indonesia for NEV market, attended by 100+ people including govt reps & media.
data.description: In Jakarta, Indonesia, on January 19, 2026, LEPAS, a fresh NEV brand by Chery Group, inaugurated its inaugural showroom. The event saw over 100 participants, comprising Indonesian government officials, media personnel, KOLs, and dealership representatives.

data.title: REAL Shows Network (RSN) adds Portland Unlocked TV series, hosted in Portland, OR, to elevate real estate stories.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on January 20, 2026, REAL Shows Network (RSN), a leading national TV platform showcasing real estate and lifestyle narratives, announced the inclusion of a fresh series called Portland Unlocked in Portland, OR. The locally hosted show is helmed by esteemed real estate expert Lulu, and aims to showcase the local real estate scene and lifestyle aspects to a wider audience across the nation.

data.title: RSN added Selling the 518, TV series spotlighting NY's Capital Region. Hosted by local real estate, showcases stories.
data.description: In Albany, New York on January 20, 2026, the REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the launch of a new series called Selling the 518 in the Capital Region. This program, dedicated to showcasing real estate and lifestyle stories, will be locally hosted and aims to highlight the unique properties and trends in the area. This addition is part of RSN's efforts to expand its programming and offer viewers a diverse range of content.

data.title: China World Summit Wing in Beijing redefines luxury as an urban lifestyle destination and social hub, located in Beijing's CBD.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, China World Summit Wing in Beijing has established itself as a premier Urban Lifestyle Destination, setting a new standard for urban luxury. Located in the heart of Beijing's CBD, this renowned hotel serves as a central hub for social gatherings and celebrations. Combining luxury amenities and exceptional service, it offers a unique experience in an bustling urban setting.

data.title: Anteris Technologies Global Corp. priced $200 million public offering of 34,782,609 common stock shares at $5.75/share.
data.description: Anteris Technologies Global Corp., a leading structural heart company based in Minneapolis and Brisbane, has revealed the pricing of its public offering. The Offering consists of 34,782,609 shares of common stock being sold at $5.75 per share. This is anticipated to generate roughly $200 million in gross proceeds for the Company before accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated offering expenses. The Offering is set to conclude on January 22, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions. Anteris is dedicated to creating and bringing cutting-edge medical devices to the market in order to enhance heart health worldwide.

data.title: Ryanair plans press conference to address Musk's tantrum on X, CEO O'Leary promises to 'undress' with a sale.
data.description: Popular Irish airline, Ryanair Holdings PLC, listed on NASDAQ as RYAAY, is making headlines for its public feud with Tesla CEO, Elon Musk. CEO Michael O'Leary is capitalizing on the controversy by organizing a press conference to address Musk's recent outburst. Dubbed the 'Great Idiots' Sale, the airline announced the event on social media platform X, where O'Leary will discuss Musk's behavior. O'Leary criticized Musk's knowledge of the aviation industry, stating that Musk understands little about airline ownership regulations or aircraft aerodynamics. The company plans to leverage this attention by turning it into a promotional campaign. The press conference is scheduled for Wednesday morning in Dublin. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
